name: Industrie Chimiche Forestali S.p.A.
summary: Industrie Chimiche Forestali S.p.A. designs, manufactures, and markets adhesives and fabrics for automotive, footwear, leather goods, upholstered furniture, flexible, and industrial packaging markets in Italy. The company markets its products under the Industrie Chimiche Forestali, ABC - Adhesive Based Chemicals, and Durabond brands. It also exports its products to approximately 60 countries around the world. The company was formerly known as Forestali S.r.l. and changed its name to Industrie Chimiche Forestali S.p.A. in October 2006. Industrie Chimiche Forestali S.p.A. was founded in 1918 and is based in Milan, Italy.
